recommendations.title: Improve conversion quality in low-SPC stores
recommendations.rationale: Sales per customer is the largest leakage source. Focus on assortment, pricing, and in-store conversion coaching.

recommendations.title: Reduce avoidable non-holiday closures
recommendations.rationale: Avoidable closures create direct missed-sales leakage on high-demand weekdays.

recommendations.title: Deploy store cluster playbooks
recommendations.rationale: Split stores into high/mid/low-volume clusters and apply distinct actions to avoid one-size-fits-all decisions.
